+
+    static func makeElement(
+        id: String,
+        type: ElementType,
+        label: String?,
+        value: String? = nil,
+        bounds: CGRect
+    ) -> DetectedElement {
+        DetectedElement(
+            id: id,
+            type: type,
+            label: label,
+            value: value,
+            bounds: bounds,
+            isEnabled: true,
+            isSelected: nil,
+            attributes: [:]
+        )
+    }
